scripts.dev: concurrently "cd auth-service && npm run dev" "cd perfile-service && npm run dev" "cd trabajo-service && npm run dev" "cd pago-service && npm run dev" "cd notificacion-service && npm run dev" "cd gateway && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently "cd auth-service && npm start" "cd perfile-service && npm start" "cd trabajo-service && npm start" "cd pago-service && npm start" "cd notificacion-service && npm start" "cd gateway && npm start"
